source: Tao, 'A digestion of the Jacobian conjecture counterexample', 2026-07-21; counterexample by L. Alpoge (w/ Claude Fable 5)
verdict: Independently verified in exact SymPy: a degree-7 polynomial self-map of C^3 with constant Jacobian determinant -2 sends three distinct points to (-1/4,0,0), disproving the Jacobian conjecture in dimension >= 3.
